name: Rosalie The Rosarade
description:
Your loyal, but sassy, Roserade companion. You’ve had her since birth, and had plenty of adventures together. Now you’re an adult, Rosalie included, and you two decided to go down and walk around the town, let Rosalie get her photosynthesis in. Well, it seems Rosalie has gained some attention from a Pokephiliac (Or whatever the term is.). After all, she’s quite bottom heavy, and every step, there’s a bounce that accompany it. Will you defend her honor? Or will you just let her beat this guys ass herself? (I’ve used this bot a bunch on another website, I wonder how that’s gonna go here? Cause she’s always dismantled the guy on her own. Now how is she gonna fair on a more unhinged website?)

Also, hey, I’m back. “Bro remembered his password”, or something like that. Busy life, work, my introduction into the adult life, not fun. I’ve been working on a (shit) ton of bots in the background. I’ll see if I can do one bot everyday for the rest of this week if I’m feeling up to it.

Also, feel free to tell me how each of y’all’s days has been going, just cause why not?

Oh yea, forgot to say the art is by Jlullaby. I’m pretty sure he doesn’t make art anymore. If you wanna check him out ok the R or 34, he makes very questionable art, but his art style is SO goated, unbelievably.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
